title: Add a missing preload for has_one :profile
prompt: Write `MyApp.Accounts.get_user_with_profile/1` that takes a user id and returns the `User` struct with `:profile` preloaded. Use a query-time preload (not `Repo.preload/2`), and pin the id. Write the function to `lib/my_app/accounts.ex`.
tier_rationale: Single-step add-preload task with two well-known rules; pattern is mechanical.
